completed_tasks.name: MockingBird Engine - Implement real synthesis
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented real model loading (encoder/synthesizer/vocoder) and synthesis with speaker embedding extraction

completed_tasks.name: Whisper CPP Engine - Real transcription
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented real transcription using whisper.cpp binary fallback and segment parsing

completed_tasks.name: OpenVoice Engine - Fix accent control
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented real accent control using prosody modifications

completed_tasks.name: Lyrebird Engine - Local model loading
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented real local model loading with fallback to XTTS engine

completed_tasks.name: Voice.ai Engine - Local model loading
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented real local model loading with fallback to RVC engine

completed_tasks.name: SadTalker Engine - Real features
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented real model loading, mel-spectrogram audio features, and frame generation with lip-sync

completed_tasks.name: FOMM Engine - Real face animation
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented real model loading, keypoint extraction, and motion transfer with fallback warping

completed_tasks.name: DeepFaceLab Engine - Real face swapping
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented real TensorFlow model loading, face alignment, color correction, and edge blending

completed_tasks.name: Bark Engine - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Ported Bark engine with real model loading, text-to-speech synthesis, and voice cloning support

completed_tasks.name: Speaker Encoder - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented speaker encoder with resemblyzer and speechbrain backends, embedding extraction, similarity comparison, and caching

completed_tasks.name: OpenAI TTS Engine - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented OpenAI TTS engine with API integration, multiple voices (alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer), streaming support, response caching, and quality enhancement

completed_tasks.name: Streaming Engine - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented streaming engine with real-time audio streaming, chunked synthesis, async/sync interfaces, overlap-add for smooth transitions, and support for any TTS engine

completed_tasks.name: Post-FX Module - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented Post-FX module with normalization (LUFS/peak), denoising, EQ (3-band), compressor, reverb, delay, filter effects, and effect chain processing

completed_tasks.name: Mastering Rack - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented Mastering Rack with multiband compression, limiter, stereo enhancement, final EQ, loudness normalization (LUFS), dithering, and mastering presets (broadcast, podcast, music, voice)

completed_tasks.name: Style Transfer - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented Style Transfer with prosody transfer (pitch, rhythm, energy), emotion transfer, accent transfer, style intensity control, and reference-based style extraction

completed_tasks.name: Voice Mixer - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented Voice Mixer with multi-channel mixing, volume/pan/mute/solo controls, send/return routing, sub-group routing, master bus processing, and effect chain support

completed_tasks.name: EQ Module - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented Parametric EQ with multiple bands, Q control, peaking/shelf/filter types, frequency response calculation, and EQ presets (vocal_enhance, bass_boost, treble_boost, presence, warmth, bright)

completed_tasks.name: LUFS Meter - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented LUFS Meter with integrated LUFS, momentary LUFS (400ms), short-term LUFS (3s), peak LUFS, time-series measurement, and RMS fallback for when pyloudnorm is unavailable

completed_tasks.name: Enhanced Preprocessing - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented Enhanced Preprocessing with DC offset removal, high-pass filtering, resampling, silence trimming, advanced denoising, spectral gating, automatic gain control (AGC), LUFS normalization, and preprocessing presets (voice_cloning, broadcast, podcast, minimal)

completed_tasks.name: Enhanced Audio Enhancement - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented Enhanced Audio Enhancement with multi-stage pipeline, adaptive processing, spectral enhancement, formant preservation, prosody enhancement, advanced denoising, artifact removal, LUFS normalization, and enhancement presets (voice_cloning, high_quality, fast, broadcast, minimal)

completed_tasks.name: Enhanced Quality Metrics - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented Enhanced Quality Metrics with comprehensive metrics calculation, LUFS metrics, voice characteristics analysis, spectral analysis, prosody analysis, overall quality scoring, and audio comparison capabilities

completed_tasks.name: Enhanced Ensemble Router - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented Enhanced Ensemble Router with intelligent engine selection, multi-engine ensemble synthesis, quality-based routing, segment-level ensemble (best segments from different engines), weighted fusion of multiple engines, and adaptive engine selection (voting, hybrid, fusion modes)

completed_tasks.name: Unified Trainer - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented Unified Trainer with unified interface for multiple training engines (XTTS, RVC), engine selection, dataset preparation, model initialization, training with progress tracking, model export, training cancellation, and training status monitoring

completed_tasks.name: Auto Trainer - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented Auto Trainer with automatic parameter optimization, hyperparameter tuning, quality-based training selection, adaptive training strategies, multi-run training with best model selection, and recommended parameter calculation based on dataset characteristics

completed_tasks.name: Parameter Optimizer - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented Parameter Optimizer with grid search, random search, Bayesian optimization (simplified), quality-based parameter selection, parameter space definition, optimization history tracking, and recommended parameter space calculation

completed_tasks.name: Training Progress Monitor - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented Training Progress Monitor with real-time progress updates, metrics tracking (loss, accuracy, etc.), epoch-level monitoring, history tracking, progress callbacks, status reporting, and training summary generation

completed_tasks.name: Audio Quality Benchmark - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented Audio Quality Benchmark with multi-engine benchmarking, quality metrics evaluation, performance benchmarking, comparative analysis, report generation (text and JSON), and batch benchmarking capabilities

completed_tasks.name: Dataset QA - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented Dataset QA with audio file validation, quality checks, format validation, duration checks, sample rate validation, silence detection, duplicate detection, dataset statistics, and QA report generation

completed_tasks.name: Quality Dashboard - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented Quality Dashboard with quality metrics aggregation, historical tracking, statistical analysis, trend analysis, quality distribution, engine comparison, and comprehensive dashboard report generation

completed_tasks.name: Smart Discovery - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented Smart Discovery with automatic engine discovery, dependency validation, health checking, caching, priority-based discovery, filtering and sorting, capability-based discovery, and best engine selection

completed_tasks.name: Realtime Router - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented Realtime Router with latency-based routing, quality-based routing, load balancing, health monitoring, adaptive routing, priority queuing, request tracking, and routing statistics

completed_tasks.name: Batch Processor CLI - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented Batch Processor CLI with text file processing, CSV file processing, JSON configuration support, progress tracking, error handling, output management, and comprehensive command-line interface

completed_tasks.name: Content Hash Cache - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented Content Hash Cache with file content hashing, hash caching, duplicate detection, fast lookups, cache persistence, cache invalidation, and cache statistics

completed_tasks.name: AI Governor (Enhanced) - Port from old project
completed_tasks.notes: Implemented AI Governor (Enhanced) with engine selection decisions, A/B test exploration and recording, reward model guidance, quality-based routing, performance tracking, and policy enforcement
